Lines.FullText: When the expression contains reference to some property object, then the expression cannot be

Elements.RawText: When the expression contains reference to some property object, then the expression cannot be

Lines.FullText: evaluated unless an owner is attached to eval value. However, the object can be cloned with the

Elements.RawText: evaluated unless an owner is attached to eval value. However, the object can be cloned with the

Lines.FullText: specified owner attached. The client can then evaluate the cloned object.

Elements.RawText: specified owner attached. The client can then evaluate the cloned object.

Description.RawText:
*
     * When the expression contains reference to some property object, then the expression cannot be
     * evaluated unless an owner is attached to eval value. However, the object can be cloned with the
     * specified owner attached. The client can then evaluate the cloned object.

Lines.FullText: When an eval value object is created, the expression is passed as an argument to the factory

Elements.RawText: When an eval value object is created, the expression is passed as an argument to the factory

Lines.FullText: function. Parsing of the expression can fail, but the factory function will always succeed. Use this

Elements.RawText: function. Parsing of the expression can fail, but the factory function will always succeed. Use this

Lines.FullText: function to check if the parsing of the expression succeeded without evaluating the expression.

Elements.RawText: function to check if the parsing of the expression succeeded without evaluating the expression.

Description.RawText:
*
     * When an eval value object is created, the expression is passed as an argument to the factory
     * function. Parsing of the expression can fail, but the factory function will always succeed. Use this
     * function to check if the parsing of the expression succeeded without evaluating the expression.

Lines.FullText: Provides dynamic evaluation of expressions. Expression is passed as an argument to a

Elements.RawText: Provides dynamic evaluation of expressions. Expression is passed as an argument to a

Lines.FullText: factory function. Expression is evaluated at runtime when result value is requested.

Elements.RawText: factory function. Expression is evaluated at runtime when result value is requested.

Description.RawText:
*
 * Provides dynamic evaluation of expressions. Expression is passed as an argument to a
 * factory function. Expression is evaluated at runtime when result value is requested.
